nasb.text: On the lips of the discerning, wisdom is found, But a rod is for the back of him who lacks understanding.

esv.text: On the lips of him who has understanding, wisdom is found, but a rod is for the back of him who lacks sense.

cnv.text: 聰明人嘴裡有智慧， 無知人背上受刑杖。

ccb.text: 明哲人口中有智慧， 无知者背上受鞭打。

csbs.text: 智慧显明在有悟性之人的嘴唇上， 杖打在缺乏心智之人的背上。
